args_redacted.content:
Top 5 Open Source LLM Frameworks in 2026
==========================================

1. LangChain
   - Description: Python orchestration framework
   - Purpose: Orchestrating and chaining LLM operations

2. LlamaIndex
   - Description: Data indexing framework
   - Purpose: Indexing and retrieving data for LLM applications

3. Haystack
   - Description: NLP pipelines framework
   - Purpose: Building end-to-end NLP and LLM pipelines

4. AutoGen
   - Description: Multi-agent framework
   - Purpose: Creating multi-agent systems with LLMs

5. CrewAI
   - Description: Role-based agents framework
   - Purpose: Building role-based agent systems for collaborative tasks

Top 5 Open Source LLM Frameworks in 2026
==========================================

1. LangChain
   - Description: Python orchestration framework

2. LlamaIndex
   - Description: Data indexing framework
   - Purpose: Indexing and retrieving data for LLM applications

3. Haystack
   - Description: NLP pipelines framework
   - Purpose: Building end-to-end NLP and LLM pipelines
